text:
the MDCD_DRUG categories)
Beneficiary User Counts BENE_CNT Unduplicated beneficiary count 1 - single row of data for the person
1/x - person used x distinct level 3 services in the file
 USER1_CNT Unduplicated SRVC_1 user count 0 - person did not use any service in the file
1/x - 1.0 - person used x distinct level 1 services in the file
 USER2_CNT Unduplicated SRVC_2 user count 0 - person did not use any service in the file
1/x - 1.0 - person used x distinct level 2 services in the file
